session.user:
Run the fast CI checks for the erk-statusline package and report all results. Do NOT fix any issues - just report them.
Run these commands and report results: 1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && make -C packages/erk-statusline test` to run the tests 2. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && make -C packages/erk-statusline lint` to run linting 3. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && make -C packages/erk-statusline typecheck` to run type checks
Report all output including any failures.
